# water falls on forest

When hiking on the east side of Maui, my family and I hiked to find one of the most facinating waterfalls we have ever seen- the Seven Sacred Pools.

A map markerHawaii, United States

Calendar outlinedPublished on November 29, 2017CameraPanasonic, DMC-GH4SafetyFree to use under the [Unsplash License](https://unsplash.com/license)
